title: CobbleMon All Stars Lunar
description: This mod adds 7 unique moons to Cobblemon, each with its own special effect. Every moon brings a different atmosphere and gameplay twist, making your world more dynamic and exciting to explore.
body:
![Cobblemon All Stars Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2a80533dcf4ba961c4348927a8731c12d234540.png)

![Partner Bisect Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3deb9b7a1b2b239eda2f53c0eb958d3bbee35d6a.png)
[Promo Code: https://bisecthosting.com/Snokayy](https://bisecthosting.com/Snokayy)

### 🌟The Ultimate Cobblemon Lunar Mod🌟

This mod introduces 7 unique moons to Cobblemon, each bringing its own special gameplay bonus and changing the way you explore, battle, and farm.

![Lunar Mod Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2ad0f358afcb224602e76253f1ae1d2bc5c548b.gif)

**Azure Moon**: Increases the chance of encountering shiny Cobblemon, perfect for collectors.

**Amethyst Moon**: Boosts the spawn rate of rare Cobblemon, helping you find the most elusive ones.

**Golden Moon**: Grants increased experience gain, making leveling and farming much faster.

**Scarlet Moon**: Enhances the spawn rates of Fighting- and Fire-type Cobblemon.

**Dark Moon**: Increases the appearance of Dark- and Ghost-type Cobblemon, creating a more dangerous atmosphere.

**Emerald Moon**: Boosts the spawn rates of Water- and Grass-type Cobblemon, ideal for nature lovers.

**Silver Moon**: Improves post-battle item drop chances, rewarding you with more loot after fights.

Each moon adds a new layer of strategy and variety, encouraging you to adapt your playstyle depending on the lunar phase. Whether you're hunting shinies, training your team, or searching for rare drops, there’s always a perfect moon for the job.

**Configuration Guide**

To configure the Lunar Cycle feature of the mod, navigate to the following file:

**AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config\cobblemon-allstars\cmallstar_lunarcycle.json**

How it works

The lunar cycle system is fully customizable through this configuration file:

"**cycleLength**": Defines the total number of in-game days in a full moon cycle. (Example: 49 means the cycle lasts 49 days.)

"**moons**": Contains the different moon types and their settings. Each moon (e.g., "DARK") can be configured with the following parameters:

"**cycleDay**": The specific day in the cycle when this moon appears.

"**skyColor**": The color of the sky during this moon (hex format, without #).

"**shinyBoost**": Multiplier applied to shiny Pokémon spawn rates.

"**rareBoost**": Multiplier applied to rare Pokémon spawn rates.

"**expBoost**": Multiplier applied to experience gained.

"**typeBoost**": Pokémon type that receives a boost during this moon.

"**typeMulti**": Multiplier applied to the selected Pokémon type.

Example
```
"cycleLength": 49,
"moons": {
  "DARK": {
    "cycleDay": 7,
    "skyColor": "5599DD",
    "shinyBoost": 3.0,
    "rareBoost": 1.0,
    "expBoost": 1.0,
    "typeBoost": "ghost",
    "typeMulti": 1.0
  }
}
```

You can freely adjust these values to customize the behavior of each moon and tailor the gameplay experience to your liking.
